title: cyclanthera hystrix
intro: Cyclanthera hystrix, also known as the rough-fruited luffa or ridged luffa, is a type of vining plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Cyclanthera hystrix include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its seeds and fruit are also used in traditional cooking and as a food source.
